positive: A minimalist and stylized design featuring a central, stylized constellation within a clean, circular border. The constellations should be formed by thin, geometric lines connecting abstract celestial dots, suggesting a whimsical cosmic map. Incorporate a subtle gradient background that transitions from deep midnight blue at the edges to a faint indigo towards the center. The overall style must be modern scientific illustration meets cosmic ethereal art, rendered with sharp lines, strong contrast, and flat graphic design elements. Emphasize negative space and clean silhouettes for optimal apparel printing. Include small, abstracted elements like crescent moons and stylized comets for visual interest. High detail, crisp lines, graphic novel quality, vector art aesthetic.
negative: blurry, messy, text, signature, logo, watermark, low resolution, noise, artifacts, gradient fade, messy lines, busy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, photo-realistic, 3d rendering
